label: Artisan Pak
blurb: Microbreweries, Wineries & Specialty Food. Fermentation tracking, excise tax, and inventory rotation.

skills.label: Food Packaging Nutrition Label Gen
skills.method: Takes a baker's raw recipe and generates FDA-compliant nutrition facts, calorie counts, and bolded allergen warnings (NUTS/DAIRY) for the sticker printer.
trigger_examples: keeps small food brands legal for grocery store shelves

skills.label: Csa Meat Share Inventory Balancer
skills.method: Ensures every farm subscriber gets an mathematically equal value of premium cuts (ribeye) vs. filler (stew meat) in their monthly box.

skills.label: Butcher Yield Carcass Calculator
skills.method: Calculates the exact profit margin of a whole cow based on the final cut weights of premium steaks vs. ground beef, adjusting retail prices to ensure a profit.

skills.label: Taproom Keg Kick Predictor
skills.method: Analyzes Friday night pour rates to tell the bartender to bring a backup keg of IPA from the cold room before the current one blows mid-rush.
trigger_examples: keeps the bar lines moving and revenue flowing

skills.label: Coffee Roaster Bean Blend Ratio
skills.method: Adjusts the ratio of Colombian to Ethiopian beans to maintain a consistent flavor profile for the "House Blend" as seasonal agricultural harvests change.

skills.label: Keg Deposit Loss Tracker
skills.method: Tracks which local bars have been holding onto empty stainless steel kegs for \>60 days, automatically adding the $50 keg deposit charge to their next invoice.
trigger_examples: recovers massive capital tied up in brewery cooperage

skills.label: Brewery Excise Tax Calculator
skills.method: Calculates federal TTB (Alcohol and Tobacco Tax and Trade Bureau) barrelage taxes based on the exact gallons packaged into kegs and cans.
trigger_examples: automates highly punitive federal alcohol compliance

skills.label: Wine Barrel Topping Schedule
skills.method: Reminds the cellar master exactly when to "top off" oak barrels with extra wine to eliminate the headspace (ullage) caused by evaporation.
trigger_examples: prevents thousands of dollars of wine from turning into vinegar

skills.label: Distillery Proof Adjustment Math
skills.method: Calculates exactly how many gallons of distilled water to add to a batch of barrel-strength bourbon to "proof it down" to exactly 80.0 proof for bottling.

skills.label: Cheese Cave Humidity Alerter
skills.method: Monitors the aging room IoT sensors; alerts the cheesemaker if conditions drift into a zone that will cause unwanted/dangerous mold growth on the brie.
